info.DAtuviSezaH: sidDAntakOmudyAm asya DAtoH nirdeSaH 'caliH' iti kftaH dfSyate  atra 'ikAraH mittvajYApanArTam asti' ityapi kOmudIkAraH spazwI karoti
info.english_meaning: to move to shake to walk
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' cala - kampane ' iti jvalAdO sTitasya (dfSyatAm 832) mittvArTe anuvAdaH  ' ...BftyAM cAlayet kampane calet ' (Slo. 158) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: GUrRitaH pracalAyita ityamaraH yo nidrayA'BiBUta AsIna eva SiraScalayati kampayati sa pracalAyito Bavati
'nyAyyAtpaTaH pravicalanti padaM na DIrAH' (Bartf॰1.84) nyAyamArgaM padamekamapi yAvannoccaranta ityAha pravI samuditO viprakarzamAhatuH
'nAdaRqyo nAma rAjYosti DarmAd vicalitaH svakAt' (yAjYa0 1358) vicalito BrazwaH
'aDikaraRavicAle ca' (pA0 5143) vicAlo'nyaTAkaraRam saNKyAntarApAdanam ekasyAnekIkaraRam anekasya cEkIkaraRam iti vfttiH
'vicAlI hi saMvatsaraSabdaH sAvanopi gaRitadivasakaH SItozRavarzalakzaRo'pi cAndramasopi' (mI0 6738 sUtre SA0 BA0) vicAlI=aniyataH
'anuccalannapi raTAd BrUBaNagena cakAra saH vilolA~llomakampena diNnAga iva BUDarAn' (rAja0 8158).. anuccalan=anuttizWan svasyADikaraRamavijahat ityarTaH
'saM yajatrEraNgAnItyaMsayoruccalayoH' (Apa0 SrO0 75142) uccalayor aMsayorye calasTAne aMsakowI tayoH (aYjanam)
